---
title: "CV Ocean Twin"
description: "A digital twin approach to coastal and ocean variability — interactive visualization of oceanographic data."
date: "2025-03-01"
categories: [App, Shiny, Remote Sensing]
---

## About

An interactive app exploring ocean surface variability through a digital twin lens. Combines satellite-derived data with modelled fields to visualize coastal dynamics and long-term trends.

## Live Demo

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/CVOceanTwin/"
        width="100%" height="650" style="border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:8px;">
</iframe>
```

[Open app in new tab](https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/CVOceanTwin/){.btn .btn-primary}

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [Shiny]{.badge-skill} [Remote Sensing]{.badge-skill}
